items.summary_en: OpenAI newsroom changed. Most visible article: "How Finance Teams Use Codex".
items.evidence_excerpt: title=How finance teams use Codex published=Tue, 12 May 2026 15:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/academy/codex-for-work/how-finance-teams-use-codex description=See how finance teams can use Codex to build MBRs, reporting packs, variance bridges, model checks, and planning scenarios from real work inputs. title=How NVIDIA engineers and researchers build with Codex published=Tue, 12 May 2026 00:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/index/nvidia description=Teams use Codex with GPT-5.5 to ship production systems and turn research ideas into runnable experiments. title=AutoScout24 scales engineering with AI-powered workflows published=Tue, 12 May 2026 00:00:00 GMT
diff_excerpt: +description=See how finance teams can use Codex to build MBRs, reporting packs, variance bridges, model checks, and planning scenarios from real work inputs.
+title=How NVIDIA engineers and researchers build with Codex
+description=Teams use Codex with GPT-5.5 to ship production systems and turn research ideas into runnable experiments.
title=What Parameter Golf taught us about AI-assisted research

description=Parameter Golf brought together 1,000+ participants and 2,000+ submissions to explore AI-assisted machine learning research, coding agents, quantization, and novel model design under strict constraints.

-description=Meet the ChatGPT Futures Class of 2026—26 student innovators using AI to build, research, and drive real-world impact. Discover how this generation is redefining learning, creativity, and opportunity with ChatGPT.
-title=Unlocking large scale AI training networks with MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection)
-description=OpenAI introduces MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection), a new supercomputer networking protocol released via OCP to improve resilience and performance in large-scale AI training clusters.
-title=GPT-5.5 Instant: smarter, clearer, and more personalized
-description=GPT-5.5 Instant updates ChatGPT’s default model with smarter, more accurate answers, reduced hallucinations, and improved personalization controls.
